body_transformation: The blocky geometric body now appears as a translucent violet lattice with faint internal energy currents visible beneath the surface, maintaining its sharp-edged structure. The dark red accents transform into swirling crimson mist within the geometric outlines, while the pink highlights become pale silver glows along the edges. The single eye remains centered but now occupies a hollow socket filled with swirling ghostly mist, and the short stubby legs retain their low stance but dissolve into thin air at the base. The curled tail tip flows into a wispy trail of shadowy vapor that extends beyond the original shape without altering its rounded form.
signature_feature: Hollow eye socket: swirling crimson mist with pale silver energy currents.
